member.summary: Validates that the specified and are valid within the given .
member.param: Valid number of items within from .
member.exception: or is less than 0 -or- and will exceed length.

member.name: M:BasicTools.FormExtension.FindAllChildren(System.Windows.Forms.Form@)
member.summary: Recursively find all child controls for a form
member.param: Form that is the starting container to check for children.
member.returns: List(Of Control) that contains a reference to all child controls.
member.remarks: If you put this module in a separate namespace from your form, Visual Studio 2010 does not recognize the extension to the form.

member.name: M:BasicTools.ControlExtension.FindAllChildren(System.Windows.Forms.Control@)
member.summary: Recursively find all child controls for a control
member.param: Control that is the starting container to check for children.
member.returns: List(Of Control) that contains a reference to all child controls.
